0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Multi-Agent Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Share memory across a team of agents for coordinated behavior."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Architecture"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Team[\"Agent Team\"]\n      A1[Agent A]\n      A2[Agent B]\n      A3[Agent C]\n  end\n  \n  subgraph Memory[\"Shared Memory\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Per-agent]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Shared]\n      SM[Semantic Memory\n      Shared]\n  end\n  \n  A1 -->|writes| WM\n  A2 -->|writes| WM\n  A3 -->|writes| WM\n  WM -->|consolidate| EM\n  WM -->|extract| SM\n  EM -->|recall| A1\n  SM -->|query| A2\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Shared vs Private Memory"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Scope"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use For"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Per-agent"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Current task context"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Shared"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Team experiences"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Shared"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Common knowledge"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Per-agent"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Private reasoning"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Shared episodic + semantic\nshared_mem = Memory(db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\")\n\n# Per-agent working memory\nagent_a = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-a\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\nagent_b = Memory(\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n  agent_id=\"agent-b\",\n  working_isolation=True,\n)\n\n# Agent A stores team observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  tags=[\"infrastructure\", \"team-knowledge\"],\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B recalls it\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Conflict Resolution"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When agents store conflicting information:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Confidence scoring"}],": Higher confidence wins"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Timestamp"}],": More recent wins"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent authority"}],": Configurable priority per agent"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Configure agent authority\nmem = Memory(\n  agent_priorities={\n      \"orchestrator\": 1.0,\n      \"worker\": 0.5,\n  }\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Synchronization"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Manual sync\nagent_a.sync_with_shared()\n\n# Auto-sync on recall\nagent_b = Memory(auto_sync=True)\n\n# Sync interval\nagent_c = Memory(sync_interval=30)  # seconds\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Deployment"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use a shared volume or network filesystem:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Docker"}],": Named volume mounted to all agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kubernetes"}],": Shared PVC"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fly.io"}],": Same volume mounted to multiple machines"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start
